children.characters: Leadership analytics: financial health score, burn rate trends, forecast projections, variance analysis, and approval cycle KPIs.
approved by Alok Mehta (Manager) — Power Plant maintenance ₹28,50,000
approved by Priya Sharma (CFO) — Smelter Unit Machinery ₹75,00,000
escalated to CFO — Dual sign-off required for ₹1,20,00,000
rejected — Vendor not on approved list (policy violation)
REQ-2819, REQ-2822, REQ-2825 pending for more than 48 hours. Auto-escalation in 2 hours.
Vendor flagged for delayed delivery: 3 of last 5 POs delivered late. Recommend alternate vendor evaluation before approval.
Smelter Unit Q4 burn rate is 34% above forecast. Projected overrun: ₹8,40,00,000 by FY end at current pace.
Request amount ₹1,20,00,000 exceeds single-approval limit (₹50,00,000). Dual CFO sign-off required per policy CP-14.
